commands.text: enum Enum values allow you to specify a list of discrete options. Use comma-separated values with no quotes, for example "active,inactive,pending" or "enum active,inactive,pending". enum
literal Literal data repeats the exact text you enter for every generated row. literal
regex Regex patterns generate random values that match the specified expression. regex
airline.aircraftType Returns a random aircraft type. domain
airline.flightNumber Returns a random flight number. Flight numbers are always 1 to 4 digits long and may include leading zeros. domain
airline.iataCode Generate an airline IATA code. domain
airline.name Generate an airline name. domain
airline.recordLocator Generates a random record locator. Record locators are 6-character alphanumeric booking references. domain
airline.seat Generates a random seat. domain
airplane.iataTypeCode Generate an airplane IATA type code. domain
airplane.name Generate an airplane model name. domain
airport.iataCode Generate an airport IATA code. domain
airport.name Generate an airport name. domain
animal.bear Returns a random bear species. domain
animal.bird Returns a random bird species. domain
animal.cat Returns a random cat breed. domain
animal.cetacean Returns a random cetacean species. domain
animal.cow Returns a random cow species. domain
animal.crocodilia Returns a random crocodilian species. domain
animal.dog Returns a random dog breed. domain
animal.fish Returns a random fish species. domain
animal.horse Returns a random horse breed. domain
animal.insect Returns a random insect species. domain
animal.lion Returns a random lion species. domain
animal.petName Returns a random pet name. domain
animal.rabbit Returns a random rabbit species. domain
animal.rodent Returns a random rodent breed. domain
animal.snake Returns a random snake species. domain
animal.type Returns a random animal type. domain
autoIncrement.sequence Generates an incrementing sequence. Values only advance when a generated row is accepted, so constraint-filtered rows do not consume sequence numbers. domain
autoIncrement.timestamp Generates a timestamp that starts from a fixed point and increments by the configured amount for each generated row. domain
book.author Returns a random author name. domain
book.format Returns a random book format. domain
book.genre Returns a random genre. domain
book.publisher Returns a random publisher. domain
book.series Returns a random series. domain
book.title Returns a random title. domain
chemicalElement.atomicNumber Generate a chemical element atomic number. domain
chemicalElement.name Generate a chemical element name. domain
chemicalElement.symbol Generate a chemical element symbol. domain
color.cmyk Returns a CMYK color. domain
color.colorByCSSColorSpace Returns a random color based on CSS color space specified. domain
color.cssSupportedFunction Returns a random css supported color function name. domain
color.cssSupportedSpace Returns a random css supported color space name. domain
color.hsl Returns an HSL color. domain
color.human Returns a random human-readable color name. domain
color.hwb Returns an HWB color. domain
color.lab Returns a LAB (CIELAB) color. domain
color.lch Returns an LCH color. domain
color.rgb Returns an RGB color. domain
color.space Returns a random color space name from the worldwide accepted color spaces. domain
commerce.department Returns a department inside a shop. domain
commerce.isbn Returns a random ISBN identifier. domain
commerce.price Generates a price between min and max (inclusive). domain
commerce.product Returns a short product name. domain
commerce.productAdjective Returns an adjective describing a product. domain
commerce.productDescription Returns a product description. domain
commerce.productMaterial Returns a material of a product. domain
commerce.productName Generates a random descriptive product name. domain
commerce.upc Returns a valid UPC-A (12 digits). domain
company.buzzAdjective Returns a random buzz adjective that can be used to demonstrate data being viewed by a manager. domain
company.buzzNoun Returns a random buzz noun that can be used to demonstrate data being viewed by a manager. domain
company.buzzPhrase Generates a random buzz phrase that can be used to demonstrate data being viewed by a manager. domain
company.buzzVerb Returns a random buzz verb that can be used to demonstrate data being viewed by a manager. domain
company.catchPhrase Generates a random catch phrase that can be displayed to an end user. domain
company.catchPhraseAdjective Returns a random catch phrase adjective that can be displayed to an end user. domain
company.catchPhraseDescriptor Returns a random catch phrase descriptor that can be displayed to an end user. domain
company.catchPhraseNoun Returns a random catch phrase noun that can be displayed to an end user. domain
company.name Generates a random company name. domain
database.collation Returns a random database collation. domain
database.column Returns a random database column name. domain
database.engine Returns a random database engine. domain
database.mongodbObjectId Returns a MongoDB ObjectId string. domain
database.type Returns a random database column type. domain
datatype.boolean Returns the boolean value true or false. domain

datatype.enum Enum helper accepts CSV values or a string array and returns one value at random. Bare CSV is supported as schema shorthand; function calls use quoted strings, arrays, or named arguments. domain
date.anytime Generates a random date that can be either in the past or in the future. domain
date.between Generates a random date between the given boundaries. domain
date.birthdate Returns a random birthdate. By default, the birthdate is generated for an adult between 18 and 80 years old. domain
date.future Generates a random date in the future. domain
date.month Returns a random name of a month. domain
date.past Generates a random date in the past. domain
date.recent Generates a random date in the recent past. domain
date.soon Generates a random date in the near future. domain
date.timeZone Returns a random IANA time zone relevant to this locale. domain
date.weekday Returns a random day of the week. domain
finance.accountName Generates a random account name. domain
finance.accountNumber Generates a random account number. domain
finance.amount Generates a random amount between the given bounds (inclusive). domain
finance.bic Generates a random SWIFT/BIC code based on the ISO-9362 format. domain
finance.bitcoinAddress Generates a random Bitcoin address. domain
finance.creditCardCVV Generates a random credit card CVV. domain
finance.creditCardIssuer Returns a random credit card issuer. domain
finance.creditCardNumber Generates a random credit card number. domain
finance.currencyCode Returns a random currency code. domain
finance.currencyName Returns a random currency name. domain
finance.currencyNumericCode Returns a random currency numeric code. domain
finance.currencySymbol Returns a random currency symbol. domain
finance.ethereumAddress Creates a random, non-checksum Ethereum address. domain
finance.iban Generates a random IBAN. domain
finance.litecoinAddress Generates a random Litecoin address. domain
finance.pin Generates a random PIN number. domain
finance.routingNumber Generates a random routing number. domain
finance.transactionDescription Generates a random transaction description. domain
finance.transactionType Returns a random transaction type. domain
food.adjective Generates a random dish adjective. domain
food.description Generates a random dish description. domain
food.dish Generates a random dish name. domain
food.ethnicCategory Generates a random food's ethnic category. domain
food.fruit Generates a random fruit name. domain
food.ingredient Generates a random ingredient name. domain
food.meat Generates a random meat domain
food.spice Generates a random spice name. domain
food.vegetable Generates a random vegetable name. domain
git.branch Generates a random branch name. domain
git.commitDate Generates a date string for a git commit using the same format as `git log`. domain
git.commitEntry Generates a random commit entry as printed by `git log`. domain
git.commitMessage Generates a random commit message. domain
git.commitSha Generates a random commit sha. domain
hacker.abbreviation Returns a random hacker/IT abbreviation. domain
hacker.adjective Returns a random hacker/IT adjective. domain
hacker.ingverb Returns a random hacker/IT verb for continuous actions (en: ing suffix; e.g. hacking). domain
hacker.noun Returns a random hacker/IT noun. domain
hacker.phrase Generates a random hacker/IT phrase. domain
hacker.verb Returns a random hacker/IT verb. domain
image.avatar Generates a random avatar image url. domain
image.avatarGitHub Generates a random avatar from GitHub. domain
image.dataUri Generates a random data uri containing an URL-encoded SVG image or a Base64-encoded SVG image. domain
image.personPortrait Generates a random square portrait (avatar) of a person. domain
image.url Generates a random image url. domain
image.urlPicsumPhotos Generates a random image url provided via https://picsum.photos. domain
internet.displayName Generates a display name using the given person's name as base. domain
internet.domainName Generates a random domain name. domain
internet.domainSuffix Returns a random domain suffix. domain
internet.domainWord Generates a random domain word. domain
internet.email Generates data using faker internet email. domain
internet.emoji Generates a random emoji. domain
internet.exampleEmail Generates data using faker internet example email. domain

internet.httpMethod Returns a random HTTP request method from an AnywayData-defined pool of GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, OPTIONS, TRACE, and CONNECT, with optional filtering for common methods and exclusions. domain
internet.httpStatusCode Generates a random HTTP status code. domain
internet.ip Generates a random IPv4 or IPv6 address. domain
internet.ipv4 Generates a random IPv4 address. domain
internet.ipv6 Generates a random IPv6 address. domain
internet.jwt Generates a random JWT (JSON Web Token). domain
internet.jwtAlgorithm Generates a random JWT (JSON Web Token) Algorithm. domain
internet.mac Generates a random mac address. domain
internet.password Generates a random password-like string. Do not use this method for generating actual passwords for users. domain
internet.port Generates a random port number. domain
internet.protocol Returns a random web protocol. Either `http` or `https`. domain
internet.url Generates a random http(s) url. domain
internet.userAgent Generates a random user agent string. domain
internet.username Generates a username using the given person's name as base. domain
language.alpha2 Returns a random ISO 639-1 language code. domain
language.alpha3 Returns a random ISO 639-2 or ISO 639-3 language code. domain
language.name Returns a random spoken language name. domain
literal.value Return the literal value provided by the caller. domain
location.buildingNumber Generates a random building number. domain
location.cardinalDirection Returns a random cardinal direction (north, east, south, west). domain
location.city Generates a random localized city name. domain
location.continent Returns a random continent name. domain
location.country Returns a random country name. domain
location.countryCode Returns a random ISO_3166-1 country code. domain
location.county Returns a random localized county, or other equivalent second-level administrative entity for the locale's country such as a district or department. domain
location.direction Returns a random direction (cardinal and ordinal; northwest, east, etc). domain
location.latitude Generates a random latitude. domain
location.longitude Generates a random longitude. domain
location.ordinalDirection Returns a random ordinal direction (northwest, southeast, etc). domain
location.secondaryAddress Generates a random localized secondary address. This refers to a specific location at a given address domain
location.state Returns a random localized state, or other equivalent first-level administrative entity for the locale's country such as a province or region. domain
location.street Generates a random localized street name. domain
location.streetAddress Generates a random localized street address. domain
location.timeZone Returns a random IANA time zone name. domain
location.zipCode Generates data using faker location zip code. domain
lorem.lines Generates the given number lines of lorem separated by `'\n'`. domain
lorem.paragraph Generates a paragraph with the given number of sentences. domain
lorem.paragraphs Generates the given number of paragraphs. domain
lorem.sentence Generates a space separated list of words beginning with a capital letter and ending with a period. domain
lorem.sentences Generates the given number of sentences. domain
lorem.slug Generates a slugified text consisting of the given number of hyphen separated words. domain
lorem.text Generates a random text based on a random lorem method. domain
lorem.word Generates a word of a specified length. domain
lorem.words Generates a space separated list of words. domain
music.album Returns a random album name. domain
music.artist Returns a random artist name. domain
music.genre Returns a random music genre. domain
music.songName Returns a random song name. domain
number.bigInt Returns a BigInt number. domain
number.binary Returns a binary string. domain

number.float Returns a single random floating-point number, by default between `0.0` and `1.0`. To change the range, pass a `min` and `max` value. To limit the number of decimal places, pass a `multipleOf` or `fractionDigits` parameter. domain
number.hex Returns a lowercase hexadecimal number. domain
number.int Returns a single random integer between zero and the given max value or the given range. domain
number.octal Returns an octal string. domain
number.romanNumeral Returns a roman numeral in String format. domain
person.bio Returns a random short biography domain
person.firstName Returns a random first name. domain
person.fullName Generates a random full name. domain
person.gender Returns a random gender. domain
person.jobArea Generates a random job area. domain
person.jobDescriptor Generates a random job descriptor. domain
person.jobTitle Generates a random job title. domain
person.jobType Generates a random job type. domain
person.lastName Returns a random last name. domain
person.middleName Returns a random middle name. domain
person.prefix Returns a random person prefix. domain
person.sex Returns a random sex. domain
person.sexType Returns a random sex type. The `SexType` is intended to be used in parameters and conditions. domain
person.suffix Returns a random person suffix. domain
person.zodiacSign Returns a random zodiac sign. domain
phone.imei Generates IMEI number. domain
phone.number Generates a random phone number. domain
string.alpha Generating a string consisting of letters in the English alphabet. domain
string.alphanumeric Generating a string consisting of alpha characters and digits. domain
string.binary Returns a binary string. domain
string.counterString Generates a counterstring for a random length between min and max (or fixed length when only one value is provided). Defaults to min=1 and max=25 when omitted. domain
string.fromCharacters Generates a string from the given characters. domain
string.hexadecimal Returns a hexadecimal string. domain
string.nanoid Generates a Nano ID. domain
string.numeric Generates a given length string of digits. domain
string.octal Returns an octal string. domain
string.sample Returns a string containing UTF-16 chars between 33 and 125 (`!` to `}`). domain
string.symbol Returns a string containing only ASCII symbol characters such as !, ", #, $, %, &, (, ), *, +, -, /, :, ;, <, =, >, ?, @, [, \, ], ^, _, `, {, |, }, and ~. domain
string.ulid Returns a ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier). domain
string.uuid Returns a UUID (Universally Unique Identifier). domain
system.commonFileExt Returns a commonly used file extension. domain
system.commonFileName Returns a random file name with a given extension or a commonly used extension. domain
system.commonFileType Returns a commonly used file type. domain
system.cron Returns a random cron expression. domain
system.directoryPath Returns a directory path. domain
system.fileExt Returns a file extension. domain
system.fileName Returns a random file name with extension. domain
system.filePath Returns a file path. domain
system.fileType Returns a file type. domain
system.mimeType Returns a mime-type. domain
system.networkInterface Returns a random network interface. domain
system.semver Returns a semantic version. domain
unit.name Generate a scientific unit name. domain
unit.symbol Generate a scientific unit symbol. domain
vehicle.bicycle Returns a type of bicycle. domain
vehicle.color Returns a vehicle color. domain
vehicle.fuel Returns a fuel type. domain
vehicle.manufacturer Returns a manufacturer name. domain
vehicle.model Returns a vehicle model. domain
vehicle.type Returns a vehicle type. domain
vehicle.vehicle Returns a random vehicle. domain
vehicle.vin Returns a vehicle identification number (VIN). domain
vehicle.vrm Returns a vehicle registration number (Vehicle Registration Mark - VRM) domain
word.adjective Returns a random adjective. domain
word.adverb Returns a random adverb. domain
word.conjunction Returns a random conjunction. domain
word.interjection Returns a random interjection. domain
word.noun Returns a random noun. domain
word.preposition Returns a random preposition. domain
word.sample Returns a random word, that can be an adjective, adverb, conjunction, interjection, noun, preposition, or verb. domain
word.verb Returns a random verb. domain
word.words Returns a random string containing some words separated by spaces. domain
helpers.arrayElement Returns one random element from the supplied array. faker
helpers.arrayElements Returns multiple random elements from the supplied array. faker
helpers.fake Interpolates faker template placeholders inside a string and returns the rendered result. faker
helpers.fromRegExp Generates a string that matches the supplied regular-expression-style pattern. faker
helpers.maybe Calls a callback and returns its value only when faker decides the optional value should be present. faker
helpers.multiple Calls a generator callback multiple times and returns the collected results as an array. faker
helpers.mustache Replaces {{placeholder}} tokens in a string using values from the supplied data object. faker
helpers.rangeToNumber Converts a number or { min, max } range into a concrete number. faker
helpers.replaceCreditCardSymbols Replaces credit-card placeholders and computes a valid Luhn checksum for the result. faker
helpers.replaceSymbols Replaces placeholder symbols such as # and ? in a string with random digits or letters. faker
helpers.shuffle Returns a shuffled copy of the supplied array. faker
helpers.slugify Converts a string into a URL-friendly slug. faker
helpers.uniqueArray Builds an array of unique values by repeatedly sampling a source until the requested length is reached. faker
helpers.weightedArrayElement Returns one value from a weighted array, favoring entries with higher weights. faker
